Romelu Lukaku scores against West Brom - but pundits question lack of celebration

Romelu Lukaku showed little emotion after opening the scoring, depsite being mobbed by his team-mates
Romelu Lukaku made it two goals in two Premier League games for Manchester United, but the Sky Sports pundits questioned his decision not to celebrate against West Brom.

Lukaku ended a five-game league drought with the winner against Bournemouth in midweek and while his header in a 2-1 win at The Hawthorns was a carbon-copy of that at Old Trafford, so too was his muted reaction.

Jose Mourinho shrugged off Lukaku's lack of celebration against the Cherries, citing its time in the game with just 25 minutes on the clock.

But the Sky Sports experts believe the forward's stony-faced expression against the Baggies was a message to his critics.

"I think it's because of the criticism he's been getting," Graeme Souness said when asked why he thought Lukaku neglected to celebrate.

"I'm a fan. He's not getting a lot of clever passes; these are goals he's having to manufacture himself - the Bournemouth goal in midweek where his power gets him there - and now this.

"For me, he's not been getting the service he needs but if he's got the huff, he's got to rise above that."

Fellow analyst Jamie Redknapp also hailed Lukaku's qualities but had stronger words for the Belgium international over his lack of celebration.

Lukaku did enjoy the Jesse Lingard goal that proved decisive

"When he gets the right delivery he's unstoppable," Redknapp said. "But I don't get the non-celebration. Whether he's unhappy with the criticism he's got, it's irrelevant.

"He's paid big money to affect games for Manchester United. Not celebrating a goal? I don't get it."

Co-commentator Gary Neville agreed with his Sky Sports colleagues in the Nissan Super Sunday studio, saying during the match: "He needs to celebrate, he absolutely does.

"He's had some criticism recently but when you score, you celebrate with those fans jumping up behind that goal. Celebrate with those fans, endear yourself to them."

Speaking to Sky Sports after the match, United boss Mourinho said Lukaku's "love" for West Brom was the reason behind his muted celebration, having played for the club on loan from Chelsea in the 2012-13 campaign.

"I think Romelu had the fact that he was a happy kid at West Brom. He was a kid that was given all the conditions here to have the evolution he had. So probably in the back of his mind is that love for the club," Mourinho said.

Antonio Valencia was forced off with a hamstring injury as Manchester United narrowly beat West Brom.

The 32-year-old was forced off in the 66th minute after going down on the far touchline and was replaced by Marcos Rojo, as Ashley Young switched from left to right-back.

United defended shakily without Valencia, with Rojo culpable for Gareth Barry's 77th-minute finish before he offered the hosts encouragement by carelessly conceding a corner.

Valencia has started all 18 of United's Premier League matches this season but that run could come to an end at Leicester on Saturday.

"This is what I call a December injury," Mourinho said. "It is an injury of accumulation of fatigue. It is a muscular one. Hamstring. Big, small, medium, I don't know. Let's wait. I think he is an experienced guy to not let it go to difficult limits.

"But it is an injury of fatigue. Everyone in the Premier League especially the ones in more accumulation of cups, European cups, they are at risk."

United were 2-0 up at half-time through goals from Romelu Lukaku and Jesse Lingard but came under intense pressure as West Brom threatened an equaliser. Mourinho was asked whether the players succumbed to nerves.

原來摩佬知道球員係會因疲勞而受傷

據稱，上賽季摩連奴就曾派出球探考察這名年輕新星，並且準備在冬季轉會窗口將其買入。

馬爾科姆在2015-2016賽季從巴西哥連泰斯轉會至法甲波爾多。本賽季他狀態火熱，在出場的16場法甲比賽中打入7粒進球。

如今曼聯正計劃買入一名邊鋒和一名邊後衞，而巴西U23國腳正是他們的主要目標。

據悉，曼聯的首次報價就將接近3000萬英鎊，因為波爾多顯然不願意出售隊中最有天賦的球員。

而另一個阻礙則是曼聯買入馬爾科姆的時機，如果曼聯的報價達到了波爾多的要求，他們可能會出售馬爾科姆，但是他們可能只會在夏天出售馬爾科姆。

正評左
支持樓主進步

AC米蘭今個夏天球隊擁有人正式轉讓給中國商人李勇鴻(Li Yonghong)，而AC米蘭就向歐洲足總要求暫時避免遵守FFP(Financial Fair Play,財政公平條例)，因為球會與資助人之間仍有不確定性，需要時間了解對方的財政情況。

近三個賽季以來AC米蘭虧損約2億5千5百萬歐羅，而FFP規定球會不可虧損超過3千萬歐羅，顯而易見AC米蘭超過了FFP的規定。在今年4月份AC米蘭向歐洲足總申請「自願協議」(Voluntary Agreement)希望暫緩FFP的處理，而當時歐洲足總表示會觀察球會的情況至2018年初。

歐洲足總會繼續監察AC米蘭的情況，直到現時為止仍然未能確定球會擁有人李勇鴻的財政狀況。AC米蘭今個夏天轉手之後大灑金錢擴軍，在轉會市場上花費達2億3千萬歐羅，買入包括邦路斯(Leonardo Bonucci)、查漢奴古(Hakan Calhanoglu)和列卡度洛迪古斯(Ricardo Rodríguez)等人。

如果球會違反FFP的話可能遭受罰款或更嚴重可能禁止出戰歐洲賽。根據歐洲足總的資料顯示，自2013-14賽季由最高罰款金額2千9百萬歐羅，降至2015-16賽季的9百萬歐羅。而且自2011年起用FFP之後，歐洲球會的虧損數字由17億歐羅降至2015年的3億歐羅，下降了接近81%，相信未來還會繼續下降。

“Manchester City aren’t the Premier League greatest ever” – Wayne Rooney

Wayne Rooney believes that Manchester City still not done it for long enough to be considered one of the best squads in the history, but he admits that the squad certainly has plenty of great talents and the squad is currently on a great unbeaten run. While talking about City’s performance with talkSPORT he stated “I’m not sure they [City] are quite there. They would have to keep going and do a lot more.” He then added “There have been so many great teams throughout the years in the Premier League. This City team needs to win trophies and needs to do it for a longer period to be in that bracket.”

While talking about the best squad ever in Premier League, Rooney said “The best ever? I would go with the Man United team from 2008!” He also thinks that the current City squad will not be able to match the performance of Arsenal’s ‘Invincibles’ run where they stayed unbeaten for the entire Premier League season. He said “I don’t think they can go unbeaten,” and added. “They have done incredibly well with the run they have been on, but the Premier League is so difficult, especially now with this Christmas period coming up.” Rooney then stated “I know they have a huge squad, a great squad of players. But there are so many top teams. I think in previous years it has been two teams and you went in knowing you would win most of the other games.” And while talking about the squad’s future he said “But now there are five or six other teams that can all beat each other and I’m sure in one of those games Man City will get beaten.”

咁迪比勁過佢添啦

朗尼效力曼聯13年，並成為球會紀錄射手後，重返母會愛華頓。22歲的馬迪爾和20歲的拉舒福特擁有不俗的能力及潛質，某程度上也是逼使朗尼尋找其他球會一隊機會的原因。

這位前英格蘭隊長相信曼聯前途光明，但寄語拉舒福特可以放更多心思在入波方面，把防守工作留給隊友：「有時，在我較早的球員生涯，我也過分努力去參與後防工作，以致當你在對手的禁區中，確實有點影響。費格遜跟我說不用做太多這些工作，主要應在球隊有機會時準備好。我想拉舒福特亦有點這樣的情況，你見到他嘗試走去後衛的位置。有這份熱誠是好的，但要激發他最佳潛能，或者他應該留在前面多一點，把工作留給後衛及中場。」

至於2015年以高身價加盟「紅魔鬼」的馬迪爾，朗尼肯定此子的能力：「馬迪爾很有能力，問題是如何栽培他。我想如果他可以發揮最佳潛能，他有能力達到英超最佳水平。有時很難認識他為人，但當你認識他，就讓他感到快樂吧。他有能力成為頂級的。」

朗尼更覺得，曼聯最近進攻表現不錯，不少年輕球員也在學習階段，近來遭受的批評是有點不公道。

Antonio Valencia was forced off with a hamstring injury as Manchester United narrowly beat West Brom.

The 32-year-old was forced off in the 66th minute after going down on the far touchline and was replaced by Marcos Rojo, as Ashley Young switched from left to right-back.

United defended shakily without Valencia, with Rojo culpable for Gareth Barry's 77th-minute finish before he offered the hosts encouragement by carelessly conceding a corner.

Valencia has started all 18 of United's Premier League matches this season but that run could come to an end at Leicester on Saturday.

"This is what I call a December injury," Mourinho said. "It is an injury of accumulation of fatigue. It is a muscular one. Hamstring. Big, small, medium, I don't know. Let's wait. I think he is an experienced guy to not let it go to difficult limits.

"But it is an injury of fatigue. Everyone in the Premier League especially the ones in more accumulation of cups, European cups, they are at risk."

United were 2-0 up at half-time through goals from Romelu Lukaku and Jesse Lingard but came under intense pressure as West Brom threatened an equaliser. Mourinho was asked whether the players succumbed to nerves.

United were 2-0 up at half-time through goals from Romelu Lukaku and Jesse Lingard but came under intense pressure as West Brom threatened an equaliser. Mourinho was asked whether the players succumbed to nerves.

曼聯年青門將基蘭奧哈拉在上周五簽下一份兩年半的新合同，他將留在曼聯直至2020年。

基蘭奧哈拉在過去曾分別外借到非聯賽球隊Stockport，以及英乙球隊Morecambe，而在上季他留在曼聯，成為U23的正選門將。上季摩連奴將他納入一隊名單，並給他45號球衣，而在上季最後一場英超主場對水晶宮的比賽，基蘭奧哈拉則被列作後備。而今季他亦曾被列入歐聯名單。

雖然基蘭奧哈拉只曾一次在賽事名單中出現，但他已經分別在不同賽事中跟隨大軍熱身。門將教練Silvino Louro以及Emilio Alvarez相信他的參予能夠有助正選以及後備門將在賽事做好準備。

基蘭奧哈拉是近十八個月以來，第四名簽下新約的門將。首先莊士東續約至2018年，現正外借至阿士東維拉。而羅美路以及彭利拿亦都簽下新約，確保他們留效至2021年。同時，曼聯亦對以上球員有延長合同一年的權利。

至於其他門將方面，曼聯首席門將迪基亞的合同將於2019年屆滿，曼聯有權延長至2020年，而現正外借至梳士貝利的英格蘭U20門將軒達臣的合約則會在今季完結。

【now.com體育】曼聯前領隊雲高爾坦言，只有英超大球會才能邀他出山執教，因為他希望領軍擊敗紅魔。

「我或許不會再執教球隊了。」66歲的雲高爾（Louis van Gaal）周日表示。「除了1個可能，就是有英超大球會找我，我就會出山，因為這樣就有機會領軍擊敗曼聯。」

雲高爾執教曼聯2季，卻被批評踢法保守及沉悶，因此就算在最後1季領軍贏得英格蘭足總盃，最終亦在2016年被辭退。有指這名荷蘭籍名帥非常不滿曼聯副主席活華特於他掌舵時，暗地斟介摩連奴入主，雲高爾對此表示：「活華特應該跟我說，我們可以一起解決事情，但我對摩連奴沒有不滿。」

雖然說對摩佬沒有心存芥蒂，但雲高爾早前批評，摩連奴在曼聯的踢法，比自己更加沉悶。

《每日郵報》報導，曼聯對西布朗的正選陣容中，有7人來自費格遜時代，加利尼維利因此批評了老東家的轉會政策。

　　今場比賽中，迪基亞、鍾斯、史摩寧、艾殊利-楊格、華倫西亞、連格和拉舒福特等7人早在費格遜時代就在隊中。

　　尼維利賽前表示：「看看後防5人，他們早在費格遜時代就在球會了。過去四五年，曼聯簽下了8名後衛，今天他們中的任何一人都沒有進入正選陣容。」

　　「過去5年曼聯的收購不夠好。莫耶斯上任後他們的收購脫節了，雲高爾和摩連奴時期，收購質量參差不齊。曼聯的收購不夠好，雜亂無章，你可以看到他們陣容中有些球員在球會效力很長時間了。」

　　隨後尼維利又在Twitter上寫道：「費格遜退役後，曼聯花了6.6億英鎊買人，這讓人害怕，也讓人清醒。」

盧卡古在對般尼茅夫及西布朗同樣取得士哥，但2次均未有興奮慶祝，心理學家菲爾莊臣說︰「盧卡古的行為反映了摩連奴的風格，他只是個年輕球員，和馬迪爾一樣需要獲得支持，假如他們是為哥迪奧拿效力，將有完全不同的相處，獲得現在與摩帥不同的支持。」

「盧卡古需要皮球去射波，就像法卡奧在曼聯只入得幾球，但回到摩納哥卻截然不同，盧卡古在愛華頓是球隊重心，但在曼聯不是。因此我認為他不慶祝是因不尊重隊友、自己和領隊，這是因摩連奴的對待所致。」

「盧卡古需要皮球去射波，就像法卡奧在曼聯只入得幾球，但回到摩納哥卻截然不同，盧卡古在愛華頓是球隊重心，但在曼聯不是。因此我認為他不慶祝是因不尊重隊友、自己和領隊，這是因摩連奴的對待所致。」

TEAM NEWS FOR BRISTOL CITY CLASH

Jose Mourinho says Manchester United must take Wednesday’s Carabao Cup quarter-final clash with Bristol City ‘really seriously’ given the standard of the Championship and has also hinted Henrikh Mkhitaryan could return to the matchday squad.

The Reds travel to Ashton Gate to face a high-flying City side, who currently sit third in the Championship and have already knocked three top-flight clubs out of the competition.

United boss Mourinho admits he will not be making too many changes to his squad given the high level of football in the second tier, but feels Mkhitaryan could feature for the first time since the win over Brighton in November.

"He [Mkhitaryan] can [be back],” Mourinho told reporters following the 2-1 win over West Brom. “I am making a few changes for the match, but not many because Bristol City are one of the best teams in the Championship.

“For me now, the Championship is not the Championship of five or 10 years ago. The Championship is now high-quality teams with lots of players that could be playing in the Premier League easily. So we need to take the game really seriously. I am going to make a few changes and it is possible Micki is involved.”

Mourinho also reiterated why the Armenian has found himself out of the Reds’ matchday squads of late.

“At the moment, we are playing [Juan] Mata, [Marcus] Rashford, [Jesse] Lingard or [Anthony] Martial and [Romelu] Lukaku," he added. "So, on the bench, we have [Zlatan] Ibrahimovic and one of the other ones, Martial or Rashford. So there is no space for everyone because you need balance on the bench too."

Sergio Romero is an option to keep goal after appearing in both previous matches in the competition, particularly considering David De Gea was subjected to a couple of bruising challenges at West Brom. Antonio Valencia appears unlikely to play after suffering a hamstring problem, while Axel Tuanzebe was not involved in the Reserves' 1-1 draw with Leicester City on Monday to hint at his possible inclusion in the squad.

Mourinho has suggested Nemanja Matic has been carrying an injury of late but felllow midfielder Paul Pogba is back from a three-game suspension.

"He [Mkhitaryan] can [be back],” Mourinho told reporters following the 2-1 win over West Brom. “I am making a few changes for the match, but not many because Bristol City are one of the best teams in the Championship.

“For me now, the Championship is not the Championship of five or 10 years ago. The Championship is now high-quality teams with lots of players that could be playing in the Premier League easily. So we need to take the game really seriously. I am going to make a few changes and it is possible Micki is involved.”

Mourinho also reiterated why the Armenian has found himself out of the Reds’ matchday squads of late.

“At the moment, we are playing [Juan] Mata, [Marcus] Rashford, [Jesse] Lingard or [Anthony] Martial and [Romelu] Lukaku," he added. "So, on the bench, we have [Zlatan] Ibrahimovic and one of the other ones, Martial or Rashford. So there is no space for everyone because you need balance on the bench too."

Sergio Romero is an option to keep goal after appearing in both previous matches in the competition, particularly considering David De Gea was subjected to a couple of bruising challenges at West Brom. Antonio Valencia appears unlikely to play after suffering a hamstring problem, while Axel Tuanzebe was not involved in the Reserves' 1-1 draw with Leicester City on Monday to hint at his possible inclusion in the squad.

Mourinho has suggested Nemanja Matic has been carrying an injury of late but felllow midfielder Paul Pogba is back from a three-game suspension.

巴塞高層與基沙文的家人吃飯一事惹怒了馬體會，他們已經向國際足聯申訴。《鏡報》引用了馬體會的聲明：“馬體會已經就巴塞反覆接觸球員和球員團隊的行為，發起投訴。”

“基沙文有長約在身，這是不被允許的。而且俱樂部也考慮到這可能影響到聯賽，巴塞現在在聯賽中排名第一，而馬體會是第二。”

《鏡報》稱馬體會更希望在明年夏天把基沙文賣給曼聯。曼聯今年夏窗時就與基沙文傳出緋聞，基沙文當時還表示有十分之六的機率在奧脫福與普巴團聚。

《鏡報》稱馬體會更希望在明年夏天把基沙文賣給曼聯。曼聯今年夏窗時就與基沙文傳出緋聞，基沙文當時還表示有十分之六的機率在奧脫福與普巴團聚。

快啦仲明夏

最近一段時間，想在冬季轉會市場中有大動作的曼聯一直處在蠢蠢欲動中。而現在，摩連奴的轉會名單中的最新人選直接瞄準了車路士天王――夏薩特。

夏薩特此前拒絕了車路士為他提供的30萬周新的新合約，這讓其他球隊看到了機會。根據《太陽報》消息，摩連奴正打算用英超創記錄的轉會身價9000萬英鎊的價格帶走比利時天王夏薩特。摩連奴認為夏薩特是他在紅魔拚圖中缺失的重要一環。
